metadata.description: Refactoring pipeline: identify target → plan incremental changes → implement one file at a time → test after each → verify no regressions

steps.title: Analyze refactoring target
steps.description: Read the target files/modules. Identify code smells: duplication, long functions, poor naming, high coupling, missing abstractions. Document current state.

steps.title: Create incremental refactoring plan
steps.description: Based on code analysis, create a step-by-step refactoring plan. Each step should be small and independently testable. Prioritize by impact. Include before/after examples.

steps.title: Establish test baseline
steps.description: Run existing tests to establish a baseline. If tests are sparse, write characterization tests that capture current behavior. Document baseline test results.

steps.title: Implement refactoring
steps.description: Execute the refactoring plan step by step. After each change: run lint, run tests. If any test fails, fix before proceeding. Keep changes small and focused.

steps.title: Review and verify refactoring
steps.description: Review the refactored code. Verify: all tests pass, no regressions, code is cleaner, performance not degraded. Confirm the refactoring goals were met.
